titleStmt.title: SII 19.459: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 459. (A.R. No. 131 of 1926.) TIRUVIḶAKKUḌI, MAYURAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, MAṆAVĀḶĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records the construction of a portion of the stone temple for Tiruvēḻvikkuḍi-Uḍaiyār by the Vaḷañjiyar and Nānādēs11iya-Dis11aiyāyittaiññūṟṟuvar (mercantile communities) who were part-residents of this place, and the completion of the same on their behalf by one Tiruvēḻvikkuḍi-Nambi alias Tiruvaiyāṟu-Yōgiyār and his son Tirukkaṟṟaḷip-Pittar who was the s11rīkaraṇam of the village. The Vaḷañjiyar seem to have had their settlement originally in South Ceylon (M.E.R. 1927, II. para 46, and A.R. No. 598 of 1926).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—. svastī śrī . ko[ pparakecaripaṉmakku] ṭṭu tiruveḻvikkuṭi Uṭaiyārkku
tirukkaṟṟaḷi Eṭukkiṉṟa tirukkaṟṟaḷiyil nālopāti tirukkaṟṟaḷi Eṭuppittār tiruveḻ
vikkuṭiyoṭu kūṭip piriyakkaṭava vaḷañciyarum nāṉāteciyat ticaiyāyirattaiññū
ṟṟuvarum Itticaiyāyirattaiññūṟṟuvar makkaḷḷumāy Eṭuppittār tiruveḻvi
kkuṭi nampiyākiya tiruvaiyāṟu yokiyārum Ivar makaṉ tiruveḻvikkuṭi śrīkaraṇattiruk kaṟṟa
ḷippittarum .
Digital edition of SII 19.459 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
